mapper.sql: session_id, request_id, object_id, version_id, upload_mode, owner_service, owner_domain, owner_type, owner_id, expected_file_name, expected_content_type, expected_content_length, expected_checksum_sha256, status, claim_version, expires_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at, last_error
mapper.insert: insert into oss_upload_session () values (#{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{requestId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{uploadMode}, #{ownerService}, #{ownerDomain}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{expectedFileName}, #{expectedContentType}, #{expectedContentLength}, #{expectedChecksumSha256}, #{status}, #{claimVersion}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{lastError}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), updated_at = values(updated_at), completed_at = values(completed_at), last_error = values(last_error), claim_version = greatest(claim_version, values(claim_version)), expires_at = values(expires_at)
mapper.update: update oss_upload_session set status = 'UPLOADING', claim_version = claim_version + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, last_error = '' where session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'READY' and expires_at > #{updatedAt}

update oss_upload_session set status = 'READY', claim_version = claim_version + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, expires_at = #{retryExpiresAt}, completed_at = null, last_error = '' where session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'UPLOADING' and claim_version = #{claimVersion}

update oss_upload_session set status = 'COMPLETED', updated_at = #{completedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, last_error = '' where session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'UPLOADING' and claim_version = #{claimVersion}

update oss_upload_session set expires_at = #{renewedExpiresAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, last_error = '' where session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'READY' and expires_at = #{expectedExpiresAt}
